title: Review-Packet Builder Implementation Gate v0

sources.label: Review-Packet Builder Input Manifest Spec v0
Multiple Myeloma Tooling Readiness Gate v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not build a review-packet builder, generator, dashboard, explorer, ranking tool, trial finder, patient matcher, recommendation system, generated packet output, or generated-claim pipeline.
Permits only a future copied-reference route-table dry-run script using public placeholder inputs.
Does not generate, rewrite, rank, summarize as advice, or strengthen biomedical claims.
Does not validate real case data, private records, patient-specific outputs, or reviewer identities.
Does not make any public artifact expert-reviewed or publication-ready.
Next selected slice is a deterministic route-table script task with refusal fixtures before any packet assembly.
